stories.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft fired about 4,800 workers (about 1 out of every 50 employees). Most of the people let go worked in selling to businesses or making Xbox games.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows large companies are making big changes, but unless you work at Microsoft, it doesn't directly affect your business. This is mostly news for workers and investors to pay attention to.

stories.title: Tech CEOs Walk Back Dire AI Job Loss Predictions
stories.simple_summary: Tech company leaders are now saying they were wrong when they predicted AI would take away lots of jobs.
stories.why_it_matters: Nobody knows yet if AI will really replace jobs or not — experts keep changing their minds, so take big predictions about the future with a grain of salt.

stories.title: AI investors may pivot to hyperscalers from chipmakers, Morgan Stanley says
Microsoft is laying off 4,800 employees
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft is firing about 4,800 employees, mostly people who sell products to businesses and people who work on Xbox video games.
stories.why_it_matters: Unless you work at Microsoft, this doesn't directly affect your daily life or small business.

stories.title: Pritzker to sign Illinois bill aimed at artificial intelligence accountability
stories.simple_summary: The governor of Illinois plans to sign a new law about making AI companies responsible for how their AI systems work.
stories.why_it_matters: This could mean AI companies operating in Illinois will have clearer rules to follow, which is generally good for protecting people.

stories.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
stories.simple_summary: A large startup building space in Paris is helping young AI companies get started and grow in Europe.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and tech entrepreneurs in Europe — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: AI altering meaning of users’ drafts on issues from abortion to climate, study finds
stories.simple_summary: A study found that AI sometimes accidentally changes the meaning of what people write when it helps them with topics like abortion or climate change.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use AI to help write emails or documents, be careful and always read what it wrote to make sure it still says what you meant.

stories.title: Treasury Has an Internal Report Warning About the Dangers of an AI Bubble - News of the United States
stories.simple_summary: The U.S. Treasury Department made a secret report warning that AI investment might become like a bubble (like when house prices got too high before 2008) and crash.
stories.why_it_matters: This warns that some AI investments might be risky, similar to any trendy investment — be cautious if someone tries to get you to invest in AI companies.

stories.title: From AI to ‘killer robots’: UN chief issues urgent governance call
stories.simple_summary: The United Nations leader is asking world governments to make rules about AI and how it's used in warfare.
stories.why_it_matters: Countries are starting to think about how to control dangerous AI uses, which is important for safety — but this is high-level government work, not something you need to worry about personally.

stories.title: Artificial Intelligence. Real War.
stories.simple_summary: This headline suggests AI is being used in war or military situations.
stories.why_it_matters: This is serious news about how governments might use AI, but the headline is too vague to explain exactly what it means.

stories.title: Some of the nation’s rich are letting AI teach their kids
stories.simple_summary: Some wealthy families are using AI computer tutors to teach their children instead of sending them to regular schools.
stories.why_it_matters: Most people still don't trust AI for important jobs like teaching, and this is mainly something only rich families can afford to try.

stories.title: The First Half of 2026 Is Over. These 2 Spectacular Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks Can Soar in the Second Half.
stories.simple_summary: A financial advice company is recommending two AI company stocks they think will do well in the second half of the year.
stories.why_it_matters: This is investment advice for people with stock market money — honest advice: be very cautious about stock tips, especially ones that say something will "soar."
